traits.locale_text: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} shock damage with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} armour penetration.

All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} shock damage with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} armour penetration.

All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} shock damage with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% armour penetration.

All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

languages.text: Все существа в радиусе 3 клеток вокруг обладателя аугмента (кроме него самого), находящиеся под воздействием {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванического резонанса{/g}, получают {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.
languages.original_text: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Все существа в радиусе 3 клеток вокруг обладателя аугмента (кроме него самого), находящиеся под воздействием {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванического резонанса{/g}, получают {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.

Все существа в радиусе 3 клеток вокруг обладателя аугмента (кроме него самого), находящиеся под воздействием {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}гальванического резонанса{/g}, получают {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.

languages.text: Todas las unidades situadas en un radio de 3 casillas en torno al usuario (excepto él mismo) que se vean afectadas por la {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}resonancia galvánica{/g} sufren {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}.
languages.original_text: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Todas las unidades situadas en un radio de 3 casillas en torno al usuario (excepto él mismo) que se vean afectadas por la {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}resonancia galvánica{/g} sufren {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}.

languages.text: Alle mit {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}Galvanikresonanz{/g} belegten Einheiten in einem Radius von 3 Feldern um den Nutzer erleiden {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}. Der Nutzer selbst ist von diesem Effekt ausgenommen.
languages.original_text: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Alle mit {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}Galvanikresonanz{/g} belegten Einheiten in einem Radius von 3 Feldern um den Nutzer erleiden {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}. Der Nutzer selbst ist von diesem Effekt ausgenommen.

languages.text: Kullanıcının etrafındaki 3 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanik yankılaşım{/g} etkisindeki kendisi hariç tüm birimler, %{uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarına{/g} maruz kalır.
languages.original_text: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcının etrafındaki 3 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanik yankılaşım{/g} etkisindeki kendisi hariç tüm birimler, %{uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarına{/g} maruz kalır.

languages.text: Toutes les unités affectées par {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}Résonance galvanique{/g} dans un rayon de 3 cases autour de l'utilisateur, sauf lui, subissent {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.
languages.original_text: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Toutes les unités affectées par {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}Résonance galvanique{/g} dans un rayon de 3 cases autour de l'utilisateur, sauf lui, subissent {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.

languages.text: 使用者自身3格内所有受{g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}电激共振{/g}影响的单位（除自身外）受到附带{uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 使用者自身3格内所有受{g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}电激共振{/g}影响的单位（除自身外）受到附带{uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。

languages.text: 使用者を中心とした半径3マス以内で、{g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}ガルヴァニック・レゾナンス{/g}の影響を受けている使用者以外の全ユニットは、{uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を{uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}で受ける。
languages.original_text: All units in a 3-cell radius around the user, except themselves, affected by {g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}galvanic resonance{/g} suffer {uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 使用者を中心とした半径3マス以内で、{g|f:37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}ガルヴァニック・レゾナンス{/g}の影響を受けている使用者以外の全ユニットは、{uip|Damage|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を{uip|Pen|37ca77c5cff34656a0a949d3aa37bfe6}%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}で受ける。
